languages.text: "Помилуй... Бог-Император..." {n}В лице сенешаля — ни единой кровинки, а во взгляде, устремленном на пустое ложе Патента — исступленный ужас. Кажется, за все время, что Абеляр сопровождал вас, сенешаль сейчас ближе всего подступил к разрыву сердца.{/n}

traits.locale_text: [ДРАФТ]"Помилуй. Нас. Бог-Император". {n}В лице сенешаля — ни единой кровинки. Вы не уверены, что сердце в груди Абеляра все еще бьется.{/n}

"Помилуй... Бог-Император..." {n}В лице сенешаля — ни единой кровинки, а во взгляде, устремленном на пустое ложе Патента — исступленный ужас. Кажется, за все время, что Абеляр сопровождал вас, сенешаль сейчас ближе всего подступил к разрыву сердца.{/n}
traits.speaker: AbelardCompanion

languages.text: "God-Emperor... have mercy." {n}The Seneschal's face is drained of all colour, and his gaze, fixed upon the empty resting place of the Warrant, holds a soul-crushing despair. In all the time Abelard has accompanied you, he has never seemed closer to his heart giving out than now.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Помилуй... Бог-Император..." {n}В лице сенешаля — ни единой кровинки, а во взгляде, устремленном на пустое ложе Патента — исступленный ужас. Кажется, за все время, что Абеляр сопровождал вас, сенешаль сейчас ближе всего подступил к разрыву сердца.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Have mercy... God-Emperor..." {n}The seneschal's face is drained of all colour, and his gaze, fixed upon the empty resting place of the Warrant, holds a frantic, soul-deep terror. In all the time Abelard has accompanied you, he has never seemed closer to his heart giving out than now.{/n}

"Have mercy... God-Emperor..." {n}The seneschal's face is drained of all colour, and his gaze, fixed upon the empty resting place of the Warrant, holds a frantic, soul-deep terror. In all the time Abelard has accompanied you, he has never seemed closer to his heart giving out than now.{/n}

"God-Emperor... have mercy." {n}The seneschal's face is drained of all colour, and his gaze, fixed upon the empty resting place of the Warrant, holds a soul-crushing despair. In all the time Abelard has accompanied you, he has never seemed closer to his heart giving out than now.{/n}

"God-Emperor... have mercy." {n}The seneschal's face is drained of all colour, and his gaze, fixed upon the empty resting place of the Warrant, holds a soul-crushing despair. In all the time Abelard has accompanied you, he has never seemed closer to his heart giving out than now.{/n}

"God-Emperor... have mercy." {n}The Seneschal's face is drained of all colour, and his gaze, fixed upon the empty resting place of the Warrant, holds a soul-crushing despair. In all the time Abelard has accompanied you, he has never seemed closer to his heart giving out than now.{/n}

languages.text: «Dios Emperador... ten piedad». {n}La cara del Senescal pierde todo el color y su mirada, fija en el lugar que debería ocupar la Patente, refleja la más profunda desesperación. Desde que conoces a Abelard nunca lo has visto tan cerca de un ataque al corazón.{/n}
languages.original_text: "God-Emperor... have mercy." {n}The Seneschal's face is drained of all colour, and his gaze, fixed upon the empty resting place of the Warrant, holds a soul-crushing despair. In all the time Abelard has accompanied you, he has never seemed closer to his heart giving out than now.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Dios Emperador... ten piedad». {n}La cara del Senescal pierde todo el color y su mirada, fija en el lugar que debería ocupar la Patente, refleja la más profunda desesperación. Desde que conoces a Abelard nunca lo has visto tan cerca de un ataque al corazón.{/n}

languages.text: “神皇……求您垂怜。”{n}总领的脸上血色尽失，他凝望着贸易授状空无一物的安放处，眼神中满是足以碾碎灵魂的绝望。阿贝拉德追随你至今，他的心从未像此刻这般濒临崩溃。{/n}
languages.original_text: "God-Emperor... have mercy." {n}The Seneschal's face is drained of all colour, and his gaze, fixed upon the empty resting place of the Warrant, holds a soul-crushing despair. In all the time Abelard has accompanied you, he has never seemed closer to his heart giving out than now.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “神皇……求您垂怜。”{n}总领的脸上血色尽失，他凝望着贸易授状空无一物的安放处，眼神中满是足以碾碎灵魂的绝望。阿贝拉德追随你至今，他的心从未像此刻这般濒临崩溃。{/n}

languages.text: « Que l'Empereur-Dieu ait pitié de nous... » {n}Le visage du sénéchal est livide, et son regard, fixé là où se trouvait la lettre de marque, est chargé d'un désespoir accablant. Durant tout le temps qu'Abélard vous accompagne, vous ne l'avez jamais vu si proche de s'effondrer.{/n}
languages.original_text: "God-Emperor... have mercy." {n}The Seneschal's face is drained of all colour, and his gaze, fixed upon the empty resting place of the Warrant, holds a soul-crushing despair. In all the time Abelard has accompanied you, he has never seemed closer to his heart giving out than now.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Que l'Empereur-Dieu ait pitié de nous... » {/n}Le visage du sénéchal est livide, et son regard, fixé là où se trouvait la lettre de marque, est chargé d'un désespoir accablant. Durant tout le temps qu'Abélard vous accompagne, vous ne l'avez jamais vu si proche de s'effondrer.{/n}

languages.text: "Tanrı İmparator... Merhamet et." {n}Seneşal'in yüzünün rengi atmış. Ruhsatname'nin boş istirahatgâhına dikilen bakışları, ruhu ezen bir umutsuzluk barındırıyor. Abelard sana eşlik ettiği bunca zaman boyunca kalbinin durmasına hiç şimdiki kadar yakın görünmemişti.{/n}
languages.original_text: "God-Emperor... have mercy." {n}The Seneschal's face is drained of all colour, and his gaze, fixed upon the empty resting place of the Warrant, holds a soul-crushing despair. In all the time Abelard has accompanied you, he has never seemed closer to his heart giving out than now.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Tanrı İmparator... Merhamet et." {n}Seneşal'in yüzünün rengi atmış. Ruhsatname'nin boş istirahatgâhına dikilen bakışları, ruhu ezen bir umutsuzluk barındırıyor. Abelard sana eşlik ettiği bunca zaman boyunca kalbinin durmasına hiç şimdiki kadar yakın görünmemişti.{/n}

languages.text: "Gottimperator ... erbarme dich." {n}Das Gesicht des Truchsess ist kreidebleich, und sein verzweifelter Blick ruht auf der leeren Ruhestätte des Handelsbriefs. Seit er an deiner Seite ist, war Abelard dem Versagen seines Herzens niemals näher als in diesem Moment.{/n}
languages.original_text: "God-Emperor... have mercy." {n}The Seneschal's face is drained of all colour, and his gaze, fixed upon the empty resting place of the Warrant, holds a soul-crushing despair. In all the time Abelard has accompanied you, he has never seemed closer to his heart giving out than now.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Gottimperator ... erbarme dich." {n}Das Gesicht des Truchsess ist kreidebleich, und sein verzweifelter Blick ruht auf der leeren Ruhestätte des Handelsbriefs. Seit er an deiner Seite ist, war Abelard dem Versagen seines Herzens niemals näher als in diesem Moment.{/n}

languages.text: "神よ、皇帝よ、慈悲を"{n}元老院長の顔から血の気が失せ、その視線は空っぽになった軍票の安置所を見つめ、魂を押しつぶすような絶望を抱いている。アベラールが陛下とご一緒してきた中で、今ほど心が折れそうになったことはなかった。{/n}
languages.original_text: "God-Emperor... have mercy." {n}The Seneschal's face is drained of all colour, and his gaze, fixed upon the empty resting place of the Warrant, holds a soul-crushing despair. In all the time Abelard has accompanied you, he has never seemed closer to his heart giving out than now.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "神よ、皇帝よ、慈悲を"{n}元老院長の顔から血の気が失せ、その視線は空っぽになった軍票の安置所を見つめ、魂を押しつぶすような絶望を抱いている。アベラールが陛下とご一緒してきた中で、今ほど心が折れそうになったことはなかった。{/n}
